eligibility.label: Program permanently CLOSED as of March 27, 2025 - all SK entrepreneur pathways discontinued
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: The Saskatchewan International Graduate Entrepreneur stream has been permanently closed since March 2025 and is no longer accepting applications

eligibility.label: Minimum CLB 7 in English or French
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Language proficiency does not meet the minimum CLB 7 requirement

eligibility.label: Must have a post-secondary degree from a Saskatchewan institution
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Must have completed a post-secondary degree at a Saskatchewan institution

eligibility.label: Must have an operating business in Saskatchewan
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Must have an operating business in Saskatchewan

eligibility.label: Must own at least 33.3% of the Saskatchewan business
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Must hold at least one-third (33.3%) ownership in the business
